title: WN-71 Traverse Limits — The Dead Zone
description: Szymanski's account, cross-referenced with Kowalski's own observation, confirms that the MG-42 in WN-71's Tobruk pit has a fixed traverse limit imposed by the concrete embrasure — the gun cannot depress far enough to cover the fifteen-yard strip immediately to the left of the wire obstacle. This is the approach corridor. Without this intelligence, any push on the wire is a frontal crossing of the primary fire lane. With it, a man carrying a Bangalore can reach the wire with a reasonable chance of surviving long enough to push it through.
